if.test: searchWords != "" and searchWords != null and searchWords.size > 0

sql.if:
AND (
tui.user_id LIKE CONCAT('%',#{searchWord},'%')
OR
tui.user_nm LIKE CONCAT('%',#{searchWord},'%')
)

mapper.sql: tui.clnt_id, tui.uuid as uid, tui.user_id, tui.user_nm, tui.user_ps, tui.last_ps_date, tui.use_yn, tui.login_fail_cnt, tui.auth_group_cd as role, tui.phone, tui.signature,
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO esg.tb_user_info ( user_id, user_nm, user_ps, auth_group_cd, phone, last_ps_date, login_fail_cnt, created_at, created_by ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{userNm}, #{userPs}, #{role}, #{phone}, now(), 0, now(), #{createdBy} )
mapper.update: UPDATE esg.tb_user_info tui SET user_nm = #{userNm}, user_ps = #{userPs}, auth_group_cd = #{role}, phone = #{phone}, login_fail_cnt = #{loginFailCnt}, updated_at = now(), updated_by = #{updatedBy}, signature = #{signature} WHERE user_id = #{userId}
mapper.select:
SELECT count(1) FROM esg.tb_user_info tui
where 1=1

SELECT
sf.file_id as logoId, tui.created_at, tui.created_by, tui.updated_at, tui.updated_by, thi.hr_id, toi.comp_id, toi.orgn_id, toi.orgn_nm, tui.fcm_token, 'U' cmd, thi.jbrp, tui.fcm_token, tui.user_id as login_id --hij.jbrp_nm FROM esg.tb_user_info tui LEFT JOIN esg.tb_hr_info thi ON thi.user_id = tui.user_id LEFT JOIN esg.tb_orgn_info toi ON thi.orgn_id = toi.orgn_id LEFT JOIN esg.tb_sys_file sf ON sf.target_id = thi.hr_id AND sf.target_type='hrImg' --LEFT JOIN esg.tb_hr_info_jbrp hij ON hij.jbrp_id = hi.jbrp WHERE tui.user_id = #{userId}

SELECT
tui.created_at, tui.created_by, tui.updated_at, tui.updated_by, 'U' cmd, thi.hr_id FROM esg.tb_user_info tui LEFT JOIN esg.tb_hr_info thi ON thi.user_id = tui.user_id WHERE uuid = #{uid}

SELECT
created_at, created_by, updated_at, updated_by FROM esg.tb_user_info tui WHERE tui.email = #{email} AND tui.user_nm = #{userNm}

SELECT a.user_id, a.user_nm, a.email, a.phone, a.auth_group_cd, b.sex_div, b.birth_dt, b.zip_cd, b.addrs1, b.addrs2, a.signature, c.orgn_id, c.orgn_nm, a.fcm_token, STRING_AGG(g.grp_nm, ', ') AS grp_nm, cg.grp_nm AS auth_group_nm FROM esg.tb_user_info a LEFT JOIN esg.tb_hr_info b ON b.user_id = a.user_id LEFT JOIN esg.tb_orgn_info c ON c.orgn_id = b.orgn_id LEFT JOIN esg.tb_group_hr_map ghm ON b.hr_id = ghm.hr_id LEFT JOIN esg.tb_group g ON g.comp_id = ghm.comp_id AND g.grp_id = ghm.grp_id LEFT JOIN esg.tb_comp_group cg ON cg.grp_cd = a.auth_group_cd WHERE a.user_id = #{userId} GROUP BY a.user_id, a.user_nm, a.email, a.phone, a.auth_group_cd, b.sex_div, b.birth_dt, b.zip_cd, b.addrs1, b.addrs2, a.signature, c.orgn_id, c.orgn_nm, a.fcm_token, cg.grp_nm

select a.hr_id as orgnHeadId, b.hr_nm as orgnHeadNm from esg.tb_hr_incharge_map a left join esg.tb_hr_info b on a.hr_id = b.hr_id where
a.target_id = (select orgn_id from esg.tb_hr_info where hr_id = #{hrId}) and a.gubun = 'HEAD' and a.target_type = 'orgn'

select c.jbrp_id, c.jbrp_nm from esg.tb_hr_info a left join esg.tb_hr_info_comp_map b on a.hr_id = b.hr_id and b.user_id = #{userId} left join esg.tb_hr_info_jbrp c on b.comp_id = c.comp_id and a.jbrp = c.jbrp_id where b.orgn_comp_yn = 'Y'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO esg.tb_user_login_hi ( login_dt, user_id, login_date, login_ip, login_device, login_success_yn ) VALUES ( TO_CHAR(NOW(), 'YYYYMM'), #{userId}, now(), #{loginIp}, #{loginDevice}, #{loginSuccessYn} )
mapper.update: update esg.tb_user_info set last_login_date = now(), last_login_os = #{loginDevice}, user_ip = #{loginIp}, login_fail_cnt = 0 where user_id = #{userId}
mapper.select: select b.user_id from esg.tb_hr_info a left join esg.tb_user_info b on a.user_id = b.user_id left join esg.tb_hr_info_comp_map c on a.hr_id = c.hr_id where b.fcm_token is not null and c.comp_id = #{compId} and c.orgn_comp_yn = 'Y'

select b.fcm_token from esg.tb_hr_info a left join esg.tb_user_info b on a.user_id = b.user_id left join esg.tb_hr_info_comp_map c on a.hr_id = c.hr_id where b.fcm_token is not null and b.user_id = #{userId} and c.orgn_comp_yn = 'Y'
select login_device from esg.tb_user_login_hi where user_id = #{userId} order by login_date desc limit 1
select * from esg.tb_sys_file where target_type = 'clientLogo' or target_type = 'compLogo' or target_type = 'CF001'
mapper.update: update esg.tb_sys_file set file_path = '개발실\■ Project\ESG경영\ESG_File_Upload\safewizpro\system\' || target_type || '\' || target_id where file_id = #{fileId}
mapper.select: select * from esg.tb_sys_file where target_type != 'clientLogo' and target_type != 'compLogo' and target_type != 'CF001'
mapper.update: update esg.tb_sys_file set file_path = '개발실\■ Project\ESG경영\ESG_File_Upload\safewizpro\' || comp_id || '\' || target_type || '\' || target_id where file_id = #{fileId}
mapper.select: select * from esg.tb_sys_file where target_type != 'clientLogo' and target_type != 'compLogo' and target_type != 'CF001' and target_type != 'partnerLogo' and target_type != 'partnerLocation' and target_type != 'hrImg' and target_type != 'workplaceThumbnail' and target_type != 'equipment' and target_type != 'process' and target_type != 'msds' and target_type != 'facilityEquip'
mapper.update: update esg.tb_sys_file set file_path = '개발실\■ Project\ESG경영\ESG_File_Upload\safewizpro\' || comp_id || '\' || #{year} || '\' || target_type || '\' || target_id where file_id = #{fileId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO esg.tb_user_info ( clnt_id, user_id, user_nm, user_ps, auth_group_cd, created_at, created_by ) VALUES ( '999999999999', #{userId}, '외부 API 사용 임시 계정', '999999999999', 'USER', now(), 'SYSTEM' )
